ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry type of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was established */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "stock_ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "removal_rankings" (
  "remove_rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company being ranked */,
  "remove_name" TEXT /* Name associated with the removal ranking */,
  "remove_culture_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking score for company culture */,
  "remove_process_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking score for business processes */,
  "remove_product_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking score for product offerings */,
  "remove_fortune_500_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking in the Fortune 500 list */,
  "evaluation_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation period */,
  "financial_health_score" TEXT /* Score reflecting the financial health of the company */,
  "customer_satisfaction_score" TEXT /* Score reflecting customer satisfaction */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "environmental_score" TEXT /* Score reflecting the company's environmental impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remove_rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_removal_rankings_evaluation_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_period_id") REFERENCES evaluation_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_removal_rankings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "average_revenue" TEXT /* Average revenue of companies in the industry */,
  "average_employee_count" INTEGER /* Average number of employees in the industry */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Annual growth rate of the industry */,
  "market_size" TEXT /* Total market size of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking type */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., Culture, Process, Product) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ranking criteria */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the ranking in overall performance */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ranking criteria was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation period */,
  "evaluation_year" INTEGER /* Year when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter in which the evaluation occurred */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the evaluation period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the evaluation period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation period (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., investment analyst, corporate strategist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the analyst */,
  "seniority_level" TEXT /* Seniority level of the analyst (e.g., Junior, Senior) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the analyst was hired */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst accessing the data */,
  "remove_rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_remove_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("remove_rank_id") REFERENCES removal_rankings ("remove_rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance trend entry */,
  "remove_rank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related ranking entry */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous ranking score */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking score */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in ranking */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking change information */,
  "impact_score" TEXT /* Impact score of the change on overall performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_trends_remove_rank_id FOREIGN KEY ("remove_rank_id") REFERENCES removal_rankings ("remove_rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Financial, Market) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
